scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose = require('mongoose'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI).then(() => { const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs'); const User = require('./models/User'); User.countDocuments().then(async (c) => { if (c === 0) { await User.create({ username: 'admin', password: 'admin123', fullName: 'System Administrator', role: 'admin', department: 'Administration' }); console.log('Admin created: admin/admin123'); } else { console.log('Users already exist'); } process.exit(0); }); }).catch(err => { console.error('DB Error:', err); process.exit(1); });"
